headline: 2 Services Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Business services providers thrive by solving complex operational challenges for their clients, allowing them to focus on their secret sauce. Market leaders have certainly capitalized on outsourcing trends and digital transformation initiatives to boost sales, helping fuel a 13.8% gain for the industry over the past six months - 6.2 percentage points higher than the S&P 500.
